case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. SYED H SAGHIR et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAGHIR, SYED H IND/DBA TOWN & COUNTRY CLEANERS POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE PET 105W HYDROCARBON RECLAIMER CLASS II WATER COOLED, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $14,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $24,611.77 DAMAGES, $2,800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $158.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $27,569.77, INTEREST $909.90. TOTAL JUDGMENT $28479.67. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SAGHIR, SYED H IND/DBA TOWN & COUNTRY CLEANERS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-05-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-01-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-08-2002

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $158.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SAGHIR, SYED H IND/DBA TOWN & COUNTRY CLEANERS
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED DEC-12-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAGHIR, SYED H IND/DBA TOWN & COUNTRY CLEANERS
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT SAGHIR, SYED H IND/DBA TOWN & COUNTRY CLEANERS
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT(EQUIPMENT VALUATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
STATUS CONFERENCE OF MAY-17-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-05-2002 CONTINUED TO MAY-17-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
